creator: me@cschwarz.com
text:
I would be interested in progress on this one.

Skimming through the release notes [1] I found that

a) we're at 0.9.12 on upstream already
b) 0.9.12 fixes several bugs related to luasec 0.6

We should bump to 0.9.12 right away.

[1] https://prosody.im/doc/release/0.9.12
